zh.Auchenbreck, Argyll and Bute, United Kin: 英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾 安德 布特奧陳布雷可
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sibylla Fitzhenry於1095年出生時，她的父親Henry I King of England28歲，母親Sybil Corbet18歲。她於1106年與King Alexander I King Of Scotland The Fierce Caenmore在英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾 安德 布特奧陳布雷可結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1122年7月12日在蘇格蘭培爾享年27歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭費伏登福姆林。

zh-hans.Auchenbreck, Argyll and Bute, United Kin: 英国苏格兰阿吉爾 安德 布特奧陳布雷可
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sibylla Fitzhenry于1095年出生时，她的父亲Henry I King of England28岁，母亲Sybil Corbet18岁。她于1106年与King Alexander I King Of Scotland The Fierce Caenmore在英国苏格兰阿吉爾 安德 布特奧陳布雷可结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1122年7月12日在苏格兰培爾享年27岁，埋葬在苏格兰費伏登福姆林。

nameMeanings.name: Fitzhenry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Henry (see Henry ), ‘son of Henry’. This surname is common in Ireland (mainly Connacht), where it has been Gaelicized as Mac Éinrí. In at least some cases, it seems to have been adopted as a surname indicating the illegitimate offspring of a man called Henry.

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

en.lifeSummary: When Sibylla Fitzhenry was born in 1095, her father, Henry I King of England, was 28 and her mother, Sybil Corbet, was 18. She married King Alexander I King Of Scotland The Fierce Caenmore in 1106, in Auchenbreck, Argyll and Bute, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 12 July 1122, in Perthshire, Scotland, at the age of 27, and was buried in Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland.

fr.Auchenbreck, Argyll and Bute, United Kin: Auchenbreck, Argyll and Bute, Écosse, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sibylla Fitzhenry est née en 1095, son père, Henry I King of England, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Sybil Corbet, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé King Alexander I King Of Scotland The Fierce Caenmore en 1106, à Auchenbreck, Argyll and Bute, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 12 juillet 1122, à Perthshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 27 ans, et a été enterrée à Dunfermline, Fife, Écosse.

de.Auchenbreck, Argyll and Bute, United Kin: Auchenbreck, Argyll and Bute, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sibylla Fitzhenry 1095 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henry I King of England 28 und ihre Mutter Sybil Corbet 18. Sie hat 1106 in Auchenbreck, Argyll and Bute, Schottland, United Kingdom King Alexander I King Of Scotland The Fierce Caenmore geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 12. Juli 1122 im Alter von 27 Jahren in Perthshire, Scotland und wurde in Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sibylla Fitzhenry è nata il nel 1095, sua padre, Henry I King of England, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Sybil Corbet, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato King Alexander I King Of Scotland The Fierce Caenmore nel 1106, nel Auchenbreck, Argyll and Bute, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 12 luglio 1122, nel Perthshire, Scotland, all'età di 27 anni, e fu sepolta a Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Sibylla Fitzhenryが1095年に生まれた時，父Henry I King of Englandは28歳，母Sybil Corbetは18歳であった。1106年にイギリススコットランドアルグイル アンド ブトアウチェンブレックでKing Alexander I King Of Scotland The Fierce Caenmoreと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1122年7月12日にスコットランドペルスシュアイアで27歳で死去し，スコットランドフィフダンフエルムラインにて埋葬された。

ko.Auchenbreck, Argyll and Bute, United Kin: 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트 오천브레크
ko.lifeSummary: Sibylla Fitzhenry(이)가 1095년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry I King of England(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sybil Corbet(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1106년 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트 오천브레크에서 King Alexander I King Of Scotland The Fierce Caenmore(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1122년 7월 12일 스컷랜드 퍼스실르에서 27세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 피프 던퍼라이인에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sibylla Fitzhenry nasceu em 1095, seu pai, Henry I King of England, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Sybil Corbet, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com King Alexander I King Of Scotland The Fierce Caenmore em 1106, em Auchenbreck, Argyll and Bute, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 12 de julho de 1122, em Perthshire, Scotland, com 27 anos, e foi sepultada em Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland.

ru.Auchenbreck, Argyll and Bute, United Kin: аучэнбрекк, аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sibylla Fitzhenry родилась в 1095 г., её отцу по имени Henry I King of England было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Sybil Corbet, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени King Alexander I King Of Scotland The Fierce Caenmore в 1106 г. в местности аучэнбрекк, аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 12 июля 1122 г. в местности пиртшир, Шотландия в возрасте 27 лет и была похоронена в местности дунфирмлаин, фиф, Шотландия.
